description: Style NoteSmart polo T-shirt from free authority for the individualistic and adventurous at heart. Pair this with slim Fit shorts and boat shoes for a laid back feel. Product DetailsPink and white striped polo T-shirt, has a concealed placket, short sleeves, embroidery on the left chest and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash in warm water with similar coloursDo not dry cleanUse a non-chlorine bleach if neededDo not iron on printSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
